creator: tgl@sss.pgh.pa.us
text:
(In reply to Justin Hibbits from comment #8)

While I can't necessarily speak to eekee57's exact problem, I can confirm that
FreeBSD-13.0-CURRENT-powerpc-20200528-r361567-disc1.iso
boots successfully (reaches the installer) on both of the PPC Mac machines that I'd previously found 11.0 and 12.0 failed to boot on.
So it's definitely been improved.  I don't have time today for a complete installation, though.
